question: Who was the Chief Guest for India's 75th Republic Day parade in 2024?
explanation: French President Emmanuel Macron was the Chief Guest for Republic Day 2024.

question: Which state's tableau won the first prize at the Republic Day 2024 parade?
explanation: Odisha's tableau won the first prize in the judges' choice category at Republic Day 2024.

question: Who was awarded the Bharat Ratna posthumously in early 2024 for his role in Bihar politics?
explanation: Former Bihar CM Karpoori Thakur was awarded the Bharat Ratna posthumously in January 2024.

question: Which country won the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2024?
explanation: India defeated South Africa in the final to win their second T20 World Cup title.

question: Who became the highest goal scorer in international football history (as of 2024)?
explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo holds the record for most international goals scored.

question: Which team won the IPL 2024 title?
explanation: KKR defeated SRH in the final to lift the IPL 2024 trophy.

question: What is the name of India's first solar mission launched by ISRO?
explanation: Aditya L1 is India's first observatory-class space-based solar mission.

question: Which Indian state launched the 'Lakhpati Didi' scheme for women empowerment?
explanation: Lakhpati Didi is a national mission to empower 3 crore SHG women with high income (UP & others active).

question: Who is the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom as of late 2024?
explanation: Keir Starmer became UK PM in July 2024 after the Labour Party's victory.

question: Which country hosted the COP28 Climate Summit?
explanation: COP28 was held in Dubai, UAE in late 2023-early 2024.

question: What is the name of the new Parliament building of India?
explanation: The new Parliament building was inaugurated in May 2023 and is part of the Central Vista project.

question: Who won the Men's Singles title at the Australian Open 2025?
explanation: Jannik Sinner won the 2025 Australian Open men's singles title.

question: Which Indian film's song 'Naatu Naatu' won an Oscar in 2023?
explanation: The song 'Naatu Naatu' from the movie RRR won the Oscar for Best Original Song.

question: Who is the current President of the Maldives (as of 2024-25)?
explanation: Mohamed Muizzu assumed office as President of Maldives in November 2023.

question: Which country recently joined NATO as its 32nd member in 2024?
explanation: Sweden officially became the 32nd member of NATO in March 2024.

question: What is the theme of BRICS Summit 2024 held in Russia?
explanation: The 16th BRICS Summit in Kazan, Russia, focused on strengthening multilateralism.

question: Who is the first Indian woman to win two individual Olympic medals?
explanation: P.V. Sindhu was the first (Rio Silver, Tokyo Bronze). Manu Bhaker became the first to win 2 in a single edition (Paris 2024).

question: Which airport was named the 'World's Best Airport' in 2024 by Skytrax?
explanation: Hamad International Airport in Doha was named the world's best airport in 2024.

question: What is the name of the NASA-ISRO joint satellite to be launched in 2025?
explanation: NISAR (NASA-ISRO Synthetic Aperture Radar) is a major joint Earth-observing mission.

question: Which Indian state has the first fully functional Smart High Court?
explanation: The Gujarat High Court inaugurated hybrid hearing systems and smart infrastructure.

question: Who won the Dada Saheb Phalke Award in 2023?
explanation: Legendary actress Waheeda Rehman was honored with the Dada Saheb Phalke Award.

question: Which city is the host of the 2026 Commonwealth Games?
explanation: Glasgow (Scotland) stepped in to host the 2026 Commonwealth Games.

question: Who is the current Secretary-General of the United Nations?
explanation: Antonio Guterres serves as the 9th Secretary-General of the UN.

question: Which country launched the world's first fourth-generation nuclear reactor in 2023-24?
explanation: China began commercial operations of the Shidao Bay nuclear plant.

question: What is the name of the indigenously developed anti-tank guided missile tested by DRDO in 2024?
explanation: Dhruvastra is the helicopter-launched version of the Nag anti-tank missile.

question: Which Indian city is known as the 'Yoga Capital of the World' and hosts the International Yoga Festival?
explanation: Rishikesh is globally recognized as the Yoga Capital.

question: Who is the current chairperson of the 16th Finance Commission of India?
explanation: Dr. Arvind Panagariya was appointed as the chairman of the 16th Finance Commission.

question: Which country will host the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
explanation: The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be jointly hosted by three North American nations.

question: What is the name of the scheme launched to provide free electricity through rooftop solar?
explanation: PM-Surya Ghar provides up to 300 units of free monthly electricity via solar panels.

question: Who won the Miss Universe 2024 title?
explanation: Victoria Kjær Theilvig of Denmark was crowned Miss Universe 2024.
